rows.label: qev085802_MSG0001
rows.name:
Now we can resume our
activities. Thank you so much![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0002
rows.name:
You truly saved us. On behalf of
Leader Lao, I offer my thanks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0003
rows.name:
We merely fulfilled our
mission. Don't worry about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0004
rows.name:
Still, Lao-san... I wonder
where he really went off to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0005
rows.name: Really. I wonder when he'll come back to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0006
rows.name:
He is providing us with
an opportunity to grow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0007
rows.name: Is he really?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0009
rows.name:
P-Please don't look at me like that.
I believe in Lao-san too, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0010
rows.name:
But isn't it awful that he'd even
forget to arrange for our supplies?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0011
rows.name:
Actually, young lady, that
was a mistake on our part.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0012
rows.name:
Him leaving deadweights behind
and acting on his own...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0013
rows.name:
Is something that has happened
often since the old days.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0014
rows.name: Since the old days? Could you be...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0015
rows.name: My name is Saiden.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0016
rows.name:
I have been working alongside
Lao-san since our time on Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0017
rows.name:
To begin with, the reason someone like me was able to
participate in the Earth Life Colonization Project...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0018
rows.name: Was because of Lao-san's recommendation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0019
rows.name:
Me and Mondo-san were working on the
development of Frontier Net, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0020
rows.name: We've always looked up to Lao-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0021
rows.name: Ah, I'm Shingo. And this here is Mondo-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0022
rows.name:
You all really respect Lao-san, don't you. I
apologize for saying such rude things earlier.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0023
rows.name: By the way, are those supplies sufficient?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0024
rows.name: They are more than enough. However...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0025
rows.name: However what mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0026
rows.name:
Well, the location where we are scheduled to install the
next Data Probe is swarming with native creatures...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0027
rows.name:
And we usually rely entirely on Lao-san
when it comes to brute strength.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0028
rows.name:
If that is the case, then
allow us to escort you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0029
rows.name:
Really? If we can have the rumored Elma team
lead the way, it would be extremely reassuring.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0030
rows.name: We're in your care![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0031
rows.name:
Mmm-mmm. It seems these two share some
sort of mutual understanding mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0032
rows.name:
It is a pathetic story, but without Lao-san, we stand
no chance against the native creatures around here...
You coming along has truly been a lifesaver.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0033
rows.name:
I would like to discuss the details
regarding the native creatures
once we arrive over there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085802_MSG0034
rows.name:
Please lead the way to the
point located to the south.[ST:wait ]
